prestazioni: VK56VD (5.6L V8) engine: Forced induction via Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (1.15 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe and Tomei 80mm titanium wastegate, paired with a GReddy intercooler core (700x300x85mm) and HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve for optimized boost response (target: 12 psi on 93 octane).

VK56VD: Full bolt-on valvetrain upgrade with Tomei Type-A 272° camshafts (12.5mm lift), Ferrea 6000-series intake/exhaust valves, and BC Gold Series valve springs with titanium retainers, mated to a custom K1 Technologies forged crankshaft (87mm stroke) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for 9,000 RPM stability.

Chassis reinforcement via Cusco Type-RS 4-point bolt-in roll cage (R35 GT-R-spec) and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm hollow, 3-position adjustable) with poly bushings, paired with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (VK56VD-specific damping curves) and Nismo 4-piston front brake calipers (350mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (R52 Pathfinder-specific, 3-piece fender flares with carbon fiber weave) paired with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap (20% gloss) and JDM-spec Nismo front bumper lip (R35 GT-R-style splitters).

Rocket Bunny V3 rear diffuser (carbon fiber, VK56VD-specific exhaust cutouts) with dual 4" Invidia N1 titanium-tip exhaust outlets, mounted via custom Vibrant Performance hangers for clearance with the rear subframe.

Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (20x10.5 +15 front, 20x12 +25 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (285/35/20 front, 315/30/20 rear), paired with Muteki SR4 lug nuts and custom extended wheel studs (ARP 7/16" 1.5" length) for hub-centric fitment.
